channel.title: Cryptography on abund4nt
channel.description: Recent content in Cryptography on abund4nt

item.title: rsa-pop-quiz
item.description: The following desiption is provided in the challenge. Description Class, take your seats! It's PRIME-time for a quiz... nc jupiter.challenges.picoctf.org 1981 A sentence inviting us to take a seat, supposedly they have a test prepared for us. We will use nc to connect to the remote server. Good morning class! It's me Ms. Adleman-Shamir-Rivest Today we will be taking a pop quiz, so I hope you studied. Cramming just will not do!
